title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel hosts economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell discussing economic questions around AGI, including optimal taxation, wealth redistribution, and inequality dynamics. The conversation challenges intuitive assumptions about how AI gains will be distributed across capital, labor, and nations.
